{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322023245CA4693CE20651711F99B"}"},"total":1910},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7329786937238242110","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我最喜欢的一本《哈利波特》同人创作！！！故事背景非常宏大！基于原著拓展的叙事很吸引人！情节设置很精彩很合理！人物设定也非常符合！没有出现什么ooc的情况，尤其是卢娜小天使！哈利波特中我最喜欢的角色，在这本书简直也被描写活了！太太太太太戳我心了！主角与卢娜的cp戏我简直不要太爱！磕死我了啊啊啊啊啊啊，希望作者不要放弃这一对[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]
如果你喜欢哈利波特，喜欢卢娜学姐，这本书你一定会超爱！如果你喜欢哈利波特同人创作，那也一定不要错过！它拥有独一档的专属故事线，又与原著融合的非常好！来吧，在这本书中体验成为一名强大的巫师，体验与卢娜的情感互动，体验跌宕起伏而又精彩绝伦的故事！
祝作者大大越来越好，感谢带来如此精彩的故事，在身体健康的前提下，也希望多多更新呀~[顶帖][求爆更][送心]","text_exts":[{"e":12,"s":8,"text":"哈利波特","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%93%88%E5%88%A9%E6%B3%A2%E7%89%B9&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741179651711F99B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227329786937238242110%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227284341720949460030%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%93%88%E5%88%A9%E6%B3%A2%E7%89%B9%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706601500,"group_id":"7284341720949460030","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw5TWHCsDwEcx/zQ+r9Nqw0gXGj+RPQSN5eUqWLJwMbn","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bc31ad7de4f64690bf0c2e1a9a13aebb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702224&x-signature=rx0f3P60LX56vPvBlpruXKOm6k0%3D","user_id":"1104324628330087","user_name":"剑梦逍遥X"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1104324628330087","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":15,"fan_ranklist_title":"覺醒者","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7284341720949460030","book_info":{"abstract":"【HP同人+单女主卢娜+无系统+慢热+成长流+霍格沃茨之遗要素+设定有改动，没接触相关小说、游戏不受影响。】
穿越到《哈利波特》的世界。
维泽特穿越之初就获得默默然，在古代魔法力量的帮助下，他将默默然成功控制，还获得邓布利多的入学邀请。
在此之前，他需要一个落脚点，而魔法部与邓布利多为他安排了地方——卢娜的家。
维泽特的魔法之旅，由此展开！
为了学习更多古代魔法，掌握默默然这种危险力量，他进入霍格沃茨学习，成为鹰院的一员。
在拉文克劳，维泽特保持爱学习的习惯，力求卷死在座的各位。
拉文克劳众人：他实在是太卷了，完全卷不过他！
被伏地魔附身的奇洛：对诅咒感兴趣？周六下午来我这，我会告诉你一切！
斯内普：你有魔药天赋，周日下午来我这，让你领略魔药的魅力！
邓布利多：这是我和格林德沃的研究成果，好好使用它，不要辜负里面的知识！
伏地魔：你的天赋引起了我的注意！跟我走吧！离开霍格沃茨！
卢修斯：为什么遇到你以后，我的黑魔标记又出现？
在《巫师实战指南》的引导下，维泽特掌握各种魔法知识，探寻古代魔法力量的奥秘，知晓这个世界的秘密。
…
决战来临，伏地魔发现正在读书的维泽特。
维泽特率先掏出魔杖，耀眼雷光闪过，图书馆重回静谧……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0bacd39fbcbdbe5531f52430ee254b9d","author":"锐辰3499","author_id":"","book_id":"7284341720949460030","book_name":"哈利波特：这个拉文克劳过分天才","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7285135447481647677","read_count":"34411","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3679820"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"1744","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/99c548f2c15bbb065b6bb419bb9b6211~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779301965&x-signature=NvMb6uZiqQwyzwv%2FXAPU8Fwq3W4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"413896299000888","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"217"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322023245CA4693CE20651711F99B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":469,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":23812,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":16341},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1707311282,"author_reply_time":1707311282,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7335650216529806105","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"1.作者大大的文笔很质朴清秀，很符合我的味口，我是从上本《武学教授》来的，没想到这一本的质量更高。还有卢娜和维泽特磕死我了[害羞][害羞][害羞]
          2.维泽特的人物形象很鲜明，那好学的小鹰简直简直满足了我对男神的幻想。作者大大的细节部分刻画的很好，也是我见过的不是波特的一条很好的时间线。还有女主卢娜，看电影时我就觉得她很漂亮，性格很好。只不过看小说的时候基本都是以赫敏为女主的。所以作者大大这也算是独具一格吧[思考][思考][思考]
         3.但是有一点不太好，作者大大更新的怎么这么慢啊？大大再努力一点点，每天更新个五章！！[抓狂][抓狂][抓狂]
         最后祝大大新年快乐，万事如意！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1707966058,"group_id":"7284341720949460030","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"此后如竟没有炬火，我便是唯一的光。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0uG8vzch1TLmbGff2TqQSSRHrPG+q4EmSu6pzSV6i2/","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9e442c49b41a4d33ba15ee43e9841849~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705972&x-signature=v%2FHvMDwDRCwGEQR3UPyOqSbsu2Y%3D","user_id":"1064755788521035","user_name":"破图"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1064755788521035","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7284341720949460030","book_info":{"abstract":"【HP同人+单女主卢娜+无系统+慢热+成长流+霍格沃茨之遗要素+设定有改动，没接触相关小说、游戏不受影响。】

0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7385366247486473022","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写得太有代入感了，作者对hp世界的研究已经登峰造极，并且有自己的独特理解，就好像真的存在这些知识一样"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1719543917,"group_id":"7284341720949460030","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"141217525939992"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7284341720949460030","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"218"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":34196,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7331309607784514366","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情很精彩，将hp原著、神奇动物在哪里和霍格沃茨之遗等要素结合起来，主线支线交织，构筑出了独特的变强之路，并且圆满了一些遗憾
细节很多，可以看出作者对于魔法世界的了解很多并且研究很深，极具代入感
人设塑造也很完美，主角非常有人格魅力，并且非常聪慧好学，纯纯一拉文克劳，但不是书呆子
感情线写得非常好（甜甜甜），并非是画蛇添足，家人带给了主角变强的动力和力量
本书主角和原著铁三角的联系并不紧密，所以体验原著剧情的视角和他们也不同，会有全新体验
我之前一天看了6小时，废寝忘食，这书引人入胜，读了才知道","text_exts":[{"e":26,"s":20,"text":"霍格沃茨之遗","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%9C%8D%E6%A0%BC%E6%B2%83%E8%8C%A8%E4%B9%8B%E9%81%97&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741179651711F99B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227331309607784514366%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227284341720949460030%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%9C%8D%E6%A0%BC%E6%B2%83%E8%8C%A8%E4%B9%8B%E9%81%97%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1707069072,"group_id":"7284341720949460030","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/35K1qEpenoltXXjJqWBvw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c201eaec072c4d3caa0beca0c16f1ddb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706918&x-signature=eB7WJLVOEpgJBfQGL6r4i4kD0ak%3D","user_id":"141217525939992","user_name":"某不知名咸鱼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"141217525939992","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1736639651,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7284341720949460030","book_info":{"abstract":"【HP同人+单女主卢娜+无系统+慢热+成长流+霍格沃茨之遗要素+设定有改动，没接触相关小说、游戏不受影响。】

维泽特的魔法之旅，由此展开！
为了学习更多古代魔法，掌握默默然这种危险力量，他进入霍格沃茨学习，成为鹰院的一员。
在拉文克劳，维泽特保持爱学习的习惯，力求卷死在座的各位。
